afghan-cookies: wrong cookie — generic chocolate-chip cookies, not Afghan (cornflake + cocoa)
air-fryer-cauliflower-steaks: mixed steamed vegetables with paprika, not cauliflower steaks
air-fryer-courgette-fries: hands holding raw whole courgettes, not breaded fries
air-fryer-tofu: raw block of tofu on a plate, not air-fried
albondigas-en-salsa: spaghetti and meatballs (Italian), not Spanish albóndigas in sauce
ambrosia-salad: whole strawberries only, not the creamy salad
apple-and-cinnamon-porridge: granola/muesli bowl with banana and raspberry, not cooked porridge
avgolemono-soup: clear vegetable-noodle soup, not the creamy Greek lemon-egg soup
bacon-spaghetti-squash-fritters: pasta dish with rocket and meat, not fritters
baked-croissants: choux pastry buns on a sheet, not croissants
banana-bread-overnight-oats: banana bread loaf with banana chips, not overnight oats in a jar
banana-oatmeal-smoothie: granola bowl with banana, not a blended smoothie
bara-brith: raw raisins flat-lay, not the Welsh fruit loaf
battenberg-cake: butter cubes on flour, not the pink-yellow checkered cake
bbq-baby-back-ribs: people scene at a BBQ event (Smokey's House of BBQ shirt), not ribs
beef-stroganoff: raw marbled ribeye on a Korean BBQ board, not creamy stroganoff
beetroot-feta-walnut-salad: raw beetroots with leaves, not the salad
berry-smoothie: frozen berries with dry-ice smoke, not a blended smoothie
bigos: raw thinly-sliced meat platter (Korean BBQ), not Polish hunter's stew
blanquette-de-veau: raw thinly-sliced meat platter, not creamy white veal stew
bourbon-biscuits: assorted Italian-style cookies (heart shapes, jam, macaroons), not chocolate sandwich bourbon biscuits
bread-and-butter-pickles: raw whole cucumbers, not pickled cucumber slices
bread-sauce: seeded bread slices with a milk jug, not the cooked white sauce
brioche-loaf: rustic sourdough boule, not buttery brioche
brownie-batter-bites: peanut butter on crackers, completely different snack
bubble-and-squeak: potatoes boiling in a pan, not the fried leftover-veg cake
cacio-e-pepe: raw pasta shells with peppercorns and salt, not the finished dish
caramelized-onion-bacon-and-parmesan-ris: Mediterranean fish/chicken with basil and olives, not risotto
carrot-cake-layered: carrot cake with cream cheese frosting, walnut topping, decorative carrot piping, slice cut showing the layers — strong hero
cauliflower-bites: roasted cauliflower in bite-sized pieces on parchment with oil and seasoning — editorial composition
cauliflower-cheese: raw whole cauliflower heads at a market, not the baked cheese-sauce dish
